description.zh-cn: 微信公众号/小程序：基于 EasyWeChat 实现小程序一键登录(code2session 自动建会员并签发 token)、公众号服务端接入与关键词自动回复、JS-SDK 签名配置。需安装 EasyWeChat 并填入 AppID/Secret 等凭证。
description.en: WeChat Official Account / Mini Program (EasyWeChat-based): mini-program one-tap login (code2session auto-creates a customer and issues a token), OA server access with keyword auto-reply, and JS-SDK signature config. Requires EasyWeChat and credentials.
